hero.title: Dawah Norway
hero.tagline: One of the Leading Dawah Organizations in Scandinavia
hero.quran: Invite to the way of your Lord with wisdom and good instruction, and argue with them in a way that is best.

home.donateText: Kindly donate generously and contribute to our ongoing dawah efforts across Norway
home.newMuslimText: Whether you're new to Islam or still learning the basics, our New Muslims section is here to support you with clear, encouraging resources every step of the way.
home.whoWeAreTitle: Who We Are and What We Do
home.whoWeAreText: Dawah Norway is a non-profit organization founded in 2021, dedicated to educating both Muslim and non-Muslim communities about Islam through information tables, dawah stands, and organized classes. We operate across six cities in Norway with local teams in Oslo, Østfold, Kristiansand, Stavanger, Trondheim, and Tromsø.
home.whyOutreachText: Creating connections and fostering understanding between Muslim and non-Muslim communities across Norway
home.whyQuranText: Our cornerstone effort providing authentic Quranic access to everyone who seeks knowledge
home.whyWorkshopText: A welcoming platform for individuals embracing Islam, providing guidance and community support
home.youthText: Inspiring and nurturing the next generation of Muslims in Norway

newMuslims.title: Welcome to Islam: A Journey of Faith
newMuslims.intro: Whether you have recently embraced Islam or are exploring the faith, this page provides essential resources to guide you on your journey.
newMuslims.becomeMuslimText: Take the first step on your journey of faith
newMuslims.courseText: A structured learning program for those new to Islam
newMuslims.guideText: Everything you need to know as a new Muslim
newMuslims.academyText: Online learning platform for new Muslims
newMuslims.purposeText: Understanding the meaning and purpose of life in Islam
newMuslims.ghusalText: Learn how to perform the purification shower
newMuslims.prayerText: Learn the Islamic prayer step by step
newMuslims.prayerTutorialText: Video series on how to perform daily prayers
newMuslims.quranText: Read the Quran with word-by-word translation and commentary
newMuslims.seerahText: Biography of Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him)
newMuslims.foundationsText: Core teachings and pillars of the Islamic faith
newMuslims.mentorsText: Get personalized guidance from experienced mentors
newMuslims.freeBooksText: Access free Islamic literature and Quran copies
newMuslims.prayerMatText: A prayer mat with visual instructions to help you pray

about.title: About Us
about.bismillah: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
about.intro: Dawah Norway is a non-profit organization founded in 2021 in Norway, dedicated to educating both Muslim and non-Muslim communities about Islam through information tables, dawah stands, and organized classes.
about.historyText: Founded in 2021, Dawah Norway has grown to become one of the leading dawah organizations in Scandinavia. We adhere to the Qur'an and authentic Sunnah, following the 'Aqidah of Ahlus-Sunnah wal-Jama'ah. With six local teams across Norway — in Oslo, Østfold, Kristiansand, Stavanger, Trondheim, and Tromsø — we actively work to share the message of Islam.
about.quranVerse: Let there be a group among you who call others to goodness, encourage what is good, and forbid what is evil — it is they who will be successful.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.statement: Our mission is to educate both Muslim and non-Muslim communities about Islam through outreach, distribution of authentic Islamic resources, and organized community programs across Norway.
mission.educationText: A welcoming platform for individuals embracing Islam, providing comprehensive guidance and community support
mission.outreachText: Creating connections and fostering understanding through dawah stands, information tables, and organized classes across six cities
mission.counselingText: Inspiring and nurturing the next generation of Muslims in Norway through mentorship and educational programs

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.statement: We envision a Norway where every individual has access to authentic Islamic knowledge, where communities are united by shared understanding and respect for one another.
vision.intro: Dawah Norway is committed to bridging cultural and belief-based gaps through educational initiatives across Scandinavia.
vision.impactText: Over 1,000 people have accepted Islam through our efforts. We have distributed over 50,000 free Quran copies and 80,000+ Islamic literature items across Norway.
vision.priority1: Expanding dawah operations to every major city in Norway
vision.priority2: Establishing collaborative partnerships with Islamic organizations across Scandinavia
vision.priority3: Developing sustainable programs for new Muslim support and youth empowerment
vision.cta: Join us in making a difference through volunteering, donations, and spreading the word of Islam.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in Touch
contact.intro: We would love to hear from you! Whether you have a question, need support, or want to learn more about our programs and initiatives, please reach out to us.
contact.name: Name
contact.sent: Message sent successfully. We will get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

donate.title: Online Donations
donate.subtitle: Make a Difference with Your Contribution
donate.intro: Your generous donations help us continue our mission of educating communities, distributing free Qurans, and supporting new Muslims across Norway. Every contribution makes a difference.
donate.cardDesc: Pay securely with Visa, Mastercard or other cards via Stripe.
donate.amountError: Please enter a valid amount (min 10 NOK).
donate.vippsError: Vipps payment could not be started. Please try again.
donate.paymentFailed: Your payment was not completed. Please try again.
donate.successText: Your generosity helps us continue our mission across Norway. May Allah reward you immensely.

cookies.title: We value your privacy
cookies.text: We use essential cookies to keep this site working. We would also like to use optional analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the site. You can accept or decline at any time.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Dawah Norway is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have.
privacy.collectText: We collect information you voluntarily share with us through our contact form (name, email, country, message, and optional phone number) and basic technical data (IP address, browser type) for security purposes.
privacy.useText: We use your information only to respond to your inquiries, support your journey with Islamic resources, and improve the quality of our outreach. We never sell or share your data with third parties for marketing.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies required for the site to function and optional analytics cookies that help us understand how the site is used. You can control cookie preferences at any time.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete the personal information we hold about you. To exercise these rights, contact us at info@dawahnorway.no.
privacy.contactText: For any questions about this privacy policy, reach out to info@dawahnorway.no or call +47 489 20 006.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using dawahnorway.com, you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.useText: This website is provided for educational and informational purposes about Islam. You agree to use it lawfully and respectfully.
terms.donationsText: All donations are voluntary and non-refundable unless required by applicable law. Donations are processed through third-party providers (Vipps, PayPal, Stripe) and subject to their respective terms.
terms.contentText: The content on this site is provided in good faith. We do our best to ensure accuracy but make no warranty of completeness or suitability for any specific purpose.
terms.linksText: We link to third-party websites for reference. We are not responsible for the content or practices of external sites.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms periodically. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactText: Questions about these terms? Email info@dawahnorway.no.
